calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-05-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-18-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2012 Set For Trial On Apr-08-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alan E. Walcher (310-557-0062) of Law Offices of Barry K. Rothman for Walter Young, plaintiff and moving party / Richard Beckman (415-495-8500) for YEVA, Inc., dba Saxe Mortgage Company, defendant and opposing party

ARGUED - The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Plaintiff's OSC re: Preliminary Injunction is denied, no showing likelihood of prevailing. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Not reported (D501)
